passes: low-level stage results expose a reusable surface contract and boundary debug counters without breaking canvas-facing APIs
unmasked effect/carrier paths skip masked-stage canvas duplication and snapshot clones only happen when an immutable reference frame is required
preview decode prefers ImageBitmap and redundant CPU surface hops around orientation/geometry are reduced

GPU-capable effect and local-mask hotspots move onto renderer-native paths with bounded parity validation, including GPU-first masked blend, filter2d, local-mask range gating, ROI/full-frame local output composition, and linear/radial local mask shapes
